Figure 8 The BET family bromodomain inhibitor JQ1 reduces LPS induced pro-inflammatory genes in primary microglial cells. (A and
B) The Ccl7, Cxcl10, Irf7, Irg1, Ccl12, Ccl2, Irf1, Il1a, and Il1b genes were significantly downregulated in JQ1 (500 nM)-treated primary microglial cells

compared with the control. The data represent three independent experiments. LPS, lipopolysaccharide; GAPDH, glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase.
